violations.text: The bar area is lacking a handwashing sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2025

Recently prepared mashed potatoes were observed held at 129 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC adjusted temperature of unit during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025

ROP fish was observed thawing with packaging intact. Fish that was under 38 degrees were opened and removed from packaging. Fish over 38 degrees was disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025

The presence of small flies is not controlled as evidenced by small flies around the bar area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PIC showed PCS report from yesterday that indicates treatment was given for the flies. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2025

The following were observed in poor repair: -prep unit door (insulation exposed) -refrigeration gaskets -server low boy (PIC elected to dispose of foods requiring refrigeration). New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -ice machine -edges of bar top -mat under grill top. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2025

The following have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris: -walls behind grill -walls/vent over dessert area -floors behind and in front (customer side) of bar. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2025
